{"action":"opened","issue":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/cupy/cupy/issues/8599","repository_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/cupy/cupy","labels_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/cupy/cupy/issues/8599/labels{/name}","comments_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/cupy/cupy/issues/8599/comments","events_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/cupy/cupy/issues/8599/events","html_url":"https://github.com/cupy/cupy/issues/8599","id":2526974161,"node_id":"I_kwDOBFKgkM6WnpDR","number":8599,"title":"cp.linalg.inv of identity producing NANs","user":{"login":"almaeder","id":74768933,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjc0NzY4OTMz","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/74768933?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/almaeder","html_url":"https://github.com/almaeder","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/almaeder/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/almaeder/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/almaeder/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/almaeder/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/almaeder/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/almaeder/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/almaeder/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/almaeder/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/almaeder/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"labels":[{"id":472944224,"node_id":"MDU6TGFiZWw0NzI5NDQyMjQ=","url":"https://api.github.com/repos/cupy/cupy/labels/cat:bug","name":"cat:bug","color":"ee0701","default":false,"description":"Bugs"}],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":0,"created_at":"2024-09-15T15:33:07Z","updated_at":"2024-09-15T15:33:07Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"NONE","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"### Description

I tried to use linalg inv for a batch of small random matrices with streams. I observed the error that the outputs are filled with NANs and infs. 

In the code snipped, the inverse of the identity matrix is taken. In the first call, the output is correct, but not in the second call.
When rng is commented out the error does not occur. In addition, the error does not occur with additional device synchronization.

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/86b5ce82-f7db-402a-95d6-0c6332bde686)

### To Reproduce

```py
import cupy as cp

def test_inv_stream(
    matrix_size,
    batch_size,
    dtype
):
    rng = cp.random.default_rng(seed=1)

    a_d = cp.empty((batch_size, matrix_size, matrix_size), dtype=dtype)

    # increase numerical stability
    for i in range(batch_size):
        a_d[i] = cp.eye(matrix_size, dtype=dtype)

    stream1 = cp.cuda.stream.Stream(non_blocking=True)
    
    stream1.synchronize()
    with stream1:
        inv_ref_d = cp.linalg.inv(a_d)
    stream1.synchronize()
    print(inv_ref_d)

test_inv_stream(5, 1, cp.float64)
test_inv_stream(10, 1, cp.float64)
```


### Installation

Wheel (`pip install cupy-***`)

### Environment

```
OS                           : Linux-4.18.0-513.9.1.el8_9.x86_64-x86_64-with-glibc2.28
Python Version               : 3.11.0
CuPy Version                 : 12.2.0
CuPy Platform                : NVIDIA CUDA
NumPy Version                : 1.24.3
SciPy Version                : 1.11.3
Cython Build Version         : 0.29.36
Cython Runtime Version       : 3.0.10
CUDA Root                    : /usr/local/cuda
nvcc PATH                    : /usr/local/cuda/bin/nvcc
CUDA Build Version           : 11080
CUDA Driver Version          : 12020
CUDA Runtime Version         : 11080
cuBLAS Version               : (available)
cuFFT Version                : 10900
cuRAND Version               : 10300
cuSOLVER Version             : (11, 4, 1)
cuSPARSE Version             : (available)
NVRTC Version                : (11, 8)
Thrust Version               : 101501
CUB Build Version            : 101501
Jitify Build Version         : <unknown>
cuDNN Build Version          : 8801
cuDNN Version                : 8700
NCCL Build Version           : None

```
